creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #10)
Ultimately, I just did a debug build of qt6-multimedia 6.7.3 and lldb was a little more helpful than gdb at pointing me in the right direction.

I agree that this should be fixed in the qt6-multimedia port. The plugin probably isn’t needed if qt6-multimedia is built with the PULSEAUDIO option disabled. I’ll have to check that.
